title: Brush Buddies Blippi Kids Toothbrushes, Manual Toothbrushes for Kids, Toothbrush for Toddlers 2-4 Years, Blippi Childrens Toothbrush, Soft Toothbrushes, 3PK
description: It’s never too early to introduce a healthy oral care routine— start with Brush Buddies Blippi Toothbrushes! Each pack includes 6 soft bristle toothbrushes with a variety of colors and designs for a fun addition to your little one’s mornings and evenings. Each children’s toothbrush features a small, rounded brush head and textured ergonomic handle for easy grip. The bristles are gentle enough to effectively clean while protecting your child’s sensitive gums and enamel.
features: [What's Included] The Brush Buddies Blippi Manual Toothbrush Pack includes 3 multi-colored Blippi kid's toothbrushes.
[Ultra-Gentle] Each soft bristle toothbrush features a rounded brush head for effective, gentle cleaning while protecting your child's delicate gums and enamel.

[Great for Toddlers] Brush Buddies Blippi Toothbrushes are a great introduction to oral care for your toddlers and young children! The small head size and ergonomic handles are ideal for little ones as they learn to brush their teeth.
[Make Brushing Fun] With bright colors and unique Blippi learning activities, the children's toothbrushes are sure to make every morning a fun and exciting routine.
[Rotate Regularly] Although dentists recommend a new toothbrush every 90 days, it's important to swap your child's toothbrush after they get sick, too!

features: 【Uncleaned Reminder Helps Build Kids' Habit】Kids can view their cleaned and uncleaned area from the color screen of the smart toothbrush, no app or phone is required. This toothbrush not only guides them to brush with 100% coverage but also coaches them to build better brushing habits.

【Pressure Reminder Protects Kids Gums】Kids don't know they're brushing too hard? This smart toothbrush will notice and remind them by real-time vibration and flashing screens. A great manual toothbrush that helps your kids brush better and protects teeth and gums.

【Smart App for Tracking And Guidance】Parents can track the kids' brushing reports from the smart toothbrush and know whether they brushing thoroughly and for enough time. It will also generate daily, weekly, monthly, and annual personalized guidance to help kids maintain good oral hygiene practices.

【WiFi Compatible for Fun Interaction】Our smart toothbrush supports WiFi connection, you can track kids' brushing performance anytime and anywhere via the internet even if you're not at home. You can also send a fun message to the toothbrush to encourage kids to become better brushers.

reviews.title: The more data the better!
reviews.text: A smart toothbrush is an excellent idea! It works and there isn’t enough data when it comes to tooth brushing. It’s helpful to know exactly where to focus, excellent idea for kids. The app works and is easy to find.

reviews.title: Pretty cool motivator for kids
reviews.text:
As the product is named, it's a manual toothbrush, so just be sure you're not expecting anything electric here. It still does involve technology as the toothbrush has a display that yields information, such as how long you've been brushing and other messages on your performance. The real feature though is that the toothbrush has a blue sensor in it which you use to connect to an app which gets information on how long you brushed, which areas, if you pressed the brush too hard on your teeth or gums, etc., and spits out a brushing report.

We thought moving to an electric toothbrush would motivate our daughter to brush more a few years ago, and it did, but the results were limited. As she's 8, and at an age where she's really becoming a bookworm, she likes reading the brushing reports and it motivates her to brush herself.

As I said the brush is manual, and obviously the bristles will wear down with time, so the head of the brush is detachable and can be replaced for $3.50 for a set of 2 (price as of January 9, 2023). Obviously, you don't want to buy a whole new brush with technology in it every time the bristles get weaker.

I'm glad this one is getting my daughter to understand to brush correctly and she wants to do it regularly to see how she's doing.

reviews.title: Cool concept to make brushing fine, interactive, and technologically appealing!
reviews.text: This seems like a really neat way to keep track of and encourage brushing teeth. Bluetooth connects to phone and functions via the app you have to download, so in order to use and track, you need to be near the connected phone or tablet. Looking forward to setting it up for my niece to use when she visits.

reviews.title: Five Stars if it suits your needs.
reviews.text:
First of all, the base color was supposed to be black and it is what they call black, but it’s kind of a copper a metallic black not a true black.
The design is compact and it works very well.
I even like the little cord holder that comes with it as it’s very ergonomically designed.
The unit works just fine for my sonicare by Phillips.
I happen to have the one with a glass. After using this a couple of days I realized I like the look of the glass better than I like this.
On the other hand, if you have a very small space in which to put it on your sink, you may prefer something with a smaller silhouette; the footprint is the same, but it’s just not as big a presence because you don’t have the height and width of the glass.

reviews.text: I got this to replace mu original charger for electric toothbrush, it looks just like it and so far, it has been working as the original, would recommend.

reviews.title: Great replacement or spare charger for Sonicare
reviews.text:
I really like my Sonic Care toothbrush and take it anywhere. So getting a second charger was a no-brainer.
I chose the gold colored base and it really looks nice.

It works just like the original and comes with the clear plastic holder, but you can also use the glass cup on it if you like. The cable is nice and long and I like that it comes in black, which fits better with some décor. I think there are some choices in regard to color of the base and cable.

Nothing bad to say about them.
perfect for travel or if you have a second home and don't want to constantly take the charger with you; and of course as a replacement.

reviews.title: Hate the feeling
reviews.text:
Picked this up alongside an OralB toothbrush to compare and...I don't understand why people like the Sonicare toothbrushes.

I've seen people say that you have to get used to the feeling, but it just feels awful. Not even necessarily the regular use, but if you accidentally touch the plastic to your teeth you get a horrible vibration feeling that shoots through your jaw/entire head. It also feels awful if you touch it on your lips on accident, too.

This alone made me return it in favor of the Oral B.

title: oogiebear 360° Toothbrush - Training Toothbrush for Babies. Safe Ultra Soft Silicone Toothbrush with Teddy Bear Baby Gum Relief and Gum Massaging Base. Baby Must Haves. BPA Free
features: MAKES BRUSHING SAFE AND BEAR-ABLE - oogiebear’s adorable and innovative baby toothbrush provides better baby oral care and makes brushing tiny teeth fun with a soft bristle brush and bear head design that ensures it never goes in too deep.

FUN AND FUNCTIONAL DESIGN - oogiebear’s unique 360 degree toothbrush effectively cleans teeth and gums with short soft bristles. The soft silicone base is easy for baby to hold while premium grade silicone bumps stimulate gums.

BABY’S FIRST TOOTHBRUSH - Made for babies 3 months and older, oogiebear toothbrush is the perfect tool to get your baby used to brushing before graduating to their first big-kid toothbrush. Its stand-up base makes it easy to clean and store.

SUPERIOR QUALITY - oogiebear toothbrush is made with the highest quality food-grade silicone. Its extra-soft bristles are fun to chew and won’t break off or cause choking while its base has a silky touch that’s soothing to gums.

DOCTOR DESIGNED, MOM TESTED, PERIODONTIST APPROVED - Created by a registered pharmacist and mother and periodontist dad, oogiebear toothbrush is designed to make learning to brush easier for parents and baby for a lifetime of bright beautiful smiles.

reviews.title: Adorable toothbrush and great teether as well but pricey
reviews.text:
This toothbrush/teether is BPA free and made of soft silicone. The head of the cute bear prevents the toothbrush piece from going too far into the baby's mouth but it is still long enough to act as a teether and also massage the gums. Babies usually do not start getting teeth until about 6 months so it can help the child get used to the first steps of "brushing their teeth." The current price of $12.99 ($15.99 minus $3) is a bit pricey for this.

Always supervise during use and be careful to clean this regularly. Because the brush area is grooved, it is important to give this a vigorous cleaning in that area as food, lint, etc. can get caught in that area depending on where the baby puts it.

reviews.title: Convenient, choke-proof baby toothbrush and teether
reviews.text: The whole thing is designed so that baby can't choke on it no matter which part she puts in her mouth.  The whole 'handle' is bendy silicone, which she also likes as a teether.  The wide bear head makes it easy for her to grab and hold onto it.  The brush is on all sides that you don't have to keep turning it around to get both upper and lower teeth, and still goes in enough to brush her tongue and gums.  It's all about the convenience.

reviews.title: Baby toothbrush
reviews.text: Baby now has two adorable teeth and we just started using this toothbrush before bed every night. Not sure how this is supposed to work because we don’t use toothpaste but he laughs and laughs so we love using it. It’s such a cute part of his bedtime routine and as he gets older he will hopefully have a great association with brushing his teeth and dental hygiene because of this

reviews.title: It was a gift
reviews.text: It was a gift to my nieces son. She said he loves it. He’s only 6 months but it’s never too early to teach. She said he won’t let it go.

reviews.title: Well designed kids toothbrush
reviews.text: Very useful toothbrush. I got it for my 8 month old who already has a few teeth. I love the design. It is relatively large, which makes it easier to my baby to hold and shew in. Since the brush is round, it works from all angles. I highly recommend it.

title: Zekuavi Replacement Heads Compatible with Phillips Sonicare Electric Toothbrush, Toothbrush Heads Fits for Diamond Protective Expert Daily 4100 5100 6100 1100 7500 6500, Black 8Pcs
features: ★Compatible with Phillips Sonicare, ProtectiveClean, ExpertClean,DailyClean,2 Series 3 Series, 4100/2100/9900Plaque Control,Gum Health, EasyClean, Essence+, FlexCare, HealthyWhite and HydroClean Philips Brush Handle, (NOT Compatible with Essence,Sonicare One,HX5611/01 Essence)

★US DuPont Bristles: Our brushes are made with DuPont bristles, which is the most representative high-quality nylon bristles. DuPont bristles mainly have the following advantages: high tenacity, strong bending recovery, outstanding wear resistance, and perfect cleaning power.

★Durable brush: Thanks to DuPont bristles, our brush can be used for a long time without being easily deformed, the service life varies according to the brushing strength of each person: from 2 months for high brushing intensity to 3 months for moderate brushing intensity

★End-rounded bristles: For our brush bristles, we have adopted a variety of top-rounding techniques. The protruding bristles on the upper, middle and lower parts of the brush undergo the first rounding process; then the concave part is rounded for the second time to ensure that each bunch of bristles meet the standard. The multi-process is only to better protect your teeth and oral health

★High density bristles: The toothbrush head adopts the latest bristle planting technology, and the number of bristles has increased by 2 times. The bottom of each bunch of bristles is fixed with metal copper sheets, which can prevent bristle shed, increase the durability of the brush head, and greatly improve the cleaning ability.

★Vibration isolation and noise reduction: 306 stainless steel is used at the interface between the bottom of the toothbrush and the electric toothbrush, which can effectively reduce shake and noise, moreover, be more resistant to corrosion. Copper sheet is used inside the brush body to conduct sonic waves, improving the sonic wave transmission efficiency and the cleaning capacity by 5 times.

★Suitable for Home Use: If you purchase our product, you will receive 8 replacement toothbrush heads neatly placed in a blister case. Each brush head has its own color markings at the bottom and back, making it easy to distinguish without worrying about confusion.
★Bacterial Protection Bristles :The special bacterial protection bristles help to keep your brush head clean and inhibit bacterial growth on the brush.

★HYGIENIC CAP :Each replacement sonicare brush head comes with a hygienic secure cover to keep your bristle free of dust and debris. You don't have to worry about bacteria that might cause you dental problems.

★Reminder bristles: Our Green indicator bristles discolour to let you know when to replace them, don't need to worry or guess. Dentists recommend replacing the brush head at least once every 3 months.

reviews.title: Works great with my sonicare
reviews.text: Works great and a good price . Good purchase, very happy with them

reviews.title: A Great Replacement
reviews.text: I'm not sure which model toothbrush I have, only that it's pretty basic and several years old, but still going strong. These brush heads are a perfect fit and work just like the brand name. I did find these to be a bit larger than the one I replaced, and the bristles were a bit longer, so it just felt bigger in my mouth overall. That being said, the bristles on these are softer and I find them to be gentler on my sensitive gums, even with the bigger brush size. Each brush has a colored dot (4 different colors) to differentiate between them if necessary. Overall, I'm happy with these.

reviews.title: Good affordable ootion
reviews.text: These brush heads are a good replacement option at an amazing price.

reviews.title: Works well for my Philips Sonicare 4100
reviews.text: This 8-pack of replacement brush heads for several Philips sonicare rechargeable toothbrush models fits my Sonicare 4100 perfectly. Popped on smoothly with no weird gaps. These are a larger size compared to the small Phillips diamond head style that I have been using and I've included a photo of a comparison showing this new replacement and the Philips sonicare branded brush side by side. I was worried they wouldn't be soft, but they are and I'm pleased with the bristles. After using for a week, I am glad I tried them and wouldn't hesitate to continue to use these and save some money.

reviews.title: Soft bristles
reviews.text:
I was running low on my Sonicare heads so I decided to give these a try, excited because they are a fraction of the cost of the name brand kind, especially for a package of 8.

They fit the handle just fine, but they aren’t chip-enabled to work with the automatic brush change reminder light on several Sonicare handles. So like regular toothbrushes you have to keep track of when you need to change it again.

I put my old ready-to-be-changed head back on immediately, as these bristles aren’t even close to “medium” hardness. They are SOFT. My old head has much stiffer-bristles than this new one, which I prefer.

I gave it a 2 rating because they do work for my Sonicare brush handle just fine, but they don’t work for me personally. If you need soft for sensitive gums, then these are for you.

You can’t go wrong with the Gum Care setting and these replacement heads if you need soft bristles. For the price, a pack of 8 is a steal!

They just aren’t for me, they are way too soft, I’m bummed.

title: Pyhralke Schallcare Replacement Brush Heads Fit for Braun Oral b, Precision Heads Compatible with Oral-B Pro1000/9600/5000/3000/1500/Genius and Smart Electric Toothbrush(4pcs)
features: Compatible with Oral-B , Deep Sweep, SmartSeries, ProSeries, Triumph, Advance Power, ProfessionalCare, ProfessionalCare SmartSeries, Vitality Floss Action, Vitality Dual Clean, Vitality CrossAction, Vitality Precision Clean, Vitality Pro White, Vitality Sensitive, Vitality TriZone.(Attention: DO NOT compatible with oral b io)

Schallcare brush heads, the bristles with bacterial protective function, which can prevent bacterial growth on the brush. Also with strong cleaning function, which can removes up to 3x more plaque along the gum line than a traditional manual toothbrush.

Safe, healthy, and durable. Made with soft and flexible DuPont bristles and approved to meet official dental health and safety standards. At the same time, the production of brush heads uses a unique process technique, which greatly enhances the durability of the toothbrush head.

The slightly longer bristles at both ends are designed to easily clean the oral blind area--every side of the innermost teeth, also clean the gap of teeth, for comprehensive cleaning, fresh breath, prevention of tooth decay.

The soft to middle bristles protect teeth from harmful hard brushes and offer a more comfortable cleaning, better for your teeth and gum health. Side-to-side bristles sweep away plaque while the moving power tip penetrates hard to reach areas and fixed filaments help to whiten the enamel, reaching the most difficult areas.

reviews.title: Good, but take a bit to soften
reviews.text: The first time I used these they made my gums bleed. It takes a bit for the bristles to soften up. The bristles also tend to look a bit frayed after a few weeks which definitely doesn’t happen with the name brand ones.

reviews.title: Every bit as good as the ones made by Oral-B
reviews.text:
I've been using Oral-B electric toothbrushes for 15-20 years and have always purchased replacement brushes made by them. This time I decided to see if I could save some money and give these a try, and I'm very glad that I did.

The only difference I can see between the Schallcare ones and the ones sold under the Oral-B Sensitive Care label is that these fit tighter, which results in a surprisingly large reduction in the noise level, and of course they only cost 1/3 as much. I've been using one the Schallcare brushes for about 6 weeks now and it shows absolutely no wear, so I think there's a good chance they will last every bit as long as the Oral-B brand ones.

reviews.title: Soft toothbrush with cute design
reviews.text: Study toothbrushes.  My toddlers love these toothbrushes and often request to have their teeth brushed just so they can hold their toothbrushes for a little while.  They would just wander around the house chomping on them throughout the day, if I allowed them too but, I know they aren't suppose to so I don't let them. :)  No bristles seem to be falling out and we have been using them for about a month at this point.  The bristles are quite soft and seem to be gentle enough for the toddler aged child.

title: Triple Bristle™ Toothbrush Travel Case | Portable Breathable Toothbrush Hard Carrying Bag for Traveling, Camping, Business Trip | Mesh Pocket for Accessories | Two Colors Blue and Pink (Pink)
description:
What's worse than losing your luggage? Opening your luggage to find your toothbrush wedged in your shoe and covered in who knows what. Protect your brush from this, get a case.
Features & Benefits
- Compatible with rechargeable & battery-operated toothbrushes*
- Compatible with rechargeable & battery-operated toothbrushes*
- Vibrant blue or pink exterior, embossed with the Triple Bristle tooth
- Vibrant blue or pink exterior, embossed with the Triple Bristle tooth
- Convenient mesh pocket fits additional oral care essentials
- Convenient mesh pocket fits additional oral care essentials
- Semi-waterproof with a reinforced zipper closure
- Semi-waterproof with a reinforced zipper closure
- Toothbrush fits securely inside with or without brush head cover on
- Toothbrush fits securely inside with or without brush head cover on
- Removable insert allows for easy cleaning
- Removable insert allows for easy cleaning
- Dimentions - 10" x 1.5" x 2.5"
- Dimentions - 10" x 1.5" x 2.5"
- Shockproof, Stylish, Durable and provides the highest level of protection against elements
- Shockproof, Stylish, Durable and provides the highest level of protection against elements
Good protection for electric toothbrush, Considering the safety of your electric toothbrush, we choose the better material to keep your triple bristle electric sonic toothbrush safe and secure wherever you go.
Meet your needs
In this case, you can carry:
- ONE toothbrush
- ONE toothbrush
- TWO toothbrush heads
- TWO toothbrush heads
- ONE Tongue Cleaner
- ONE Tongue Cleaner
- Mesh pocket for the accessories. Soft lining inside the case for protection.
- Mesh pocket for the accessories. Soft lining inside the case for protection.
- Right size and Right weight allows for easy and convenient portability on the go.
- Right size and Right weight allows for easy and convenient portability on the go.
* NOTE: Travel cases were NOT designed to fit the Triple Bristle Kids toothbrush shape/size, we have one in the making. Stay tuned.
features: ✅ PREMIUM HARD CASE MATERIAL - Made to fit ONLY the Triple Bristle sonic toothbrushes. Compatible with the rechargeable and battery-operated toothbrushes. Our travel case is made with premium materials in a matte texture. Very lightweight which is easy to carry with you anywhere you go. Your brush fits securely inside with or without brush head cover on.
✅ KEEP YOUR BRUSH CLEAN AND DRY - Semi-waterproof with a reinforced zipper closure. Each toothbrush travel case can hold one toothbrush, extra brush head and tongue cleaner.

✅ PROPERLY DESIGNED PORTABLE & DURABLE - Toothbrush case is convenient to carry, perfect for travel. Take your brush to work, to the gym, in your purse or even in your glove box in the car. Put the toothbrush case in your suitcase or bag. Great for business trips, traveling, school, camping and away from your home.

✅ COMPACT & HYGENIC - Easy to clean and maintain, keeps your toothbrushes clean and dry in a healthy environment. High-quality plastic case, sturdy, slim, and easy to carry. Dust-proof and moisture-proof protects the toothbrush. Save space in your purse, carry-on, or travel toiletry bag. Rounded corner design will not scratch other items in your bag.

✅ SLEEK TOOTHBRUSH CASE – This 10” x 1.5” x 2.5” case comes in two vibrant colors – blue and pink. The case and zipper are embossed with the Triple Bristle tooth to sport the Triple Bristle lifestyle in a sleek and elegant way.
✅ TRIPLE BRISTLE FAMILY OF PRODUCTS - Check out our line of sonic toothbrushes with our patented 3 head brush design for a faster more reliable clean!

✅ A CASE WITH A PURPOSE - It's a toothbrush case with a purpose: to protect your toothbrush from the elements, while letting you take it everywhere you go without worrying about what might happen to it.

title: EcoDent Tooth Powder Daily Care, Baking Soda Tooth Powder, Fluoride Free, Low Abrasion with Baking Soda, Tooth Powder for Toothbrush, Original Mint Tooth Powder (3 Pack-2 Oz Ea)
description:
Eco-Dent DailyCare Mint Toothpowder is made with baking soda, minerals, peppermint oil, and myrrh. It provides an economical way to support your oral health.
The effervescent formula reaches all areas of your mouth to clean deeply and freshen your breath with every use. Easy to apply with your toothbrush, the low abrasion formula protects delicate tooth enamel while delivering the legendary cleaning power of baking soda.
The tooth powder contains no fluoride, SLS, parabens, artificial sweeteners, colors, and is cruelty free and vegan friendly.
features: EFFERVESCENT TOOTHPOWDER: Eco Dent tooth powder delivers a deep cleaning action to your mouth while neutralizing acids.
GENTLE TOOTH POWDER: Our low abrasion powder for cleaning teeth is gentle on enamel and may be used alone or sprinkled over toothpaste.
TIME-TESTED INGREDIENTS: Our original mint tooth powder contains baking soda, minerals, and essential oils to support your oral care needs and freshen your breath.
ECONOMICAL & LONG LASTING: Our travel size toothpaste powder is a convenient and economical oral care solution that lasts for up to 200 brushings.
PREMIUM ORAL CARE: Eco-Dent DailyCare Baking Soda Toothpowder is used and recommended by dentists, oral surgeons, and periodontists.

reviews.title: Fresh breath minus harsh chemicals

reviews.title: Great toothpaste!
reviews.text:
I've used the anise and cinnamon flavors many times. I don't like mint toothpaste that overpowers. This one is more subtle, really impressed.

I've used this product for many years. Took a few brushes to get used to the salty baking powder taste, but it's been smooth sailing ever since... And no cavities!

reviews.title: Tooth Powder
reviews.text: This product is the bomb!  Been using it for years and always get compliments on how nice and white my teeth are.  The container seems to last forever so that compensates for the slightly high price for a toothpaste.  Keep in mind, it has no fluoride so if you need fluoride like I do, I mix this with crest for a bright shiny smile.

reviews.title: Make a softer brush
reviews.text: It cleans well, the bristles are not soft. I use it for my son with sensory issues. If they could make a brush with soft bristles, I would buy in bulk!

reviews.title: Fraction of the work of normal toothbrushes!
reviews.text: These toothbrushes are great. I have been using the Mentadent (similar type of brush for adults) brushes on my teeth for years and can't find them anymore. I came across these brushes for my autistic child from a therapist. It allows me to brush their teeth in half the time and more precisely than when I try a regular toothbrush. It also helps them learn to brush their teeth with less frustration while hitting more areas of the teeth. Its a great concept and I am really surprised the regular toothbrush manufacturers aren't making these and putting them in stores everywhere.  The downside is the price- I do wish they were cheaper.

title: Bamboo Aesthetic Toothbrush Wood Set of 10 | Ultra Soft Bristles | Black Charcoal Infused | American Brand | Upgrade Hygiene & Reduce Waste | Brushes Teeth Care | Earth Friendly | Plant Based
features: GO GREEN – Show your commitment to the environment by switching to a bamboo toothbrush. Our sustainable toothbrushes use fewer resources and will help you reduce your plastic consumption.
GREAT FOR FAMILIES – Get a 12-month supply for every member of your household. Save time and money with a pack of 10 toothbrushes instead of purchasing each individually.

SMOOTH & BAMBOO MADE HANDLE – Our toothbrush handles are made from water-resistant bamboo, which is stronger and harder than wood. Unlike plastic, they can be used without having to be dried after rinsing.

AN AMERICAN COMPANY – Our family owned brand is based in Florida and currently produces most of our products abroad. However, once consumer demand increases, we'll bring it back to the U.S. Spread the word and let's go green together!

SATISFACTION GUARANTEED – We want you to love our quality bamboo toothbrushes as much as we do. If for any reason you don't, simply return it for a full refund of the purchase price - it's the best and we guarantee it!

reviews.title: Bamboo Toothbrush I Soft Bristles Best for Sensitive Gums
reviews.text: I had bought a different toothbrush a couple of yrs. ago with the charcoal activated bristles, that I really like. I expected these to be similar, but I now wish I had not bought these. The bristles were not as soft as I'm used to & the design of this toothbrush could be improved upon. First of all, the wood handles are rough (kind of like sanded wood that hasn't been properly sealed & finished). They were not comfortable to hold or use for brushing teeth. However, they'd be great for cleaning or to use in art or craft projects (which is what I intend to use them for) so they won't go to waste! But I won't be buying them as a toothbrush again.

reviews.title: Fake 5 star reviews on here!
reviews.text:
[[VIDEOID:5dfb9184c45053dabbd9b211960ab648]] First of all, there is some fake sketchy reviews on here… there is no way that these crappie silicone toothbrushes will actually brush your teeth and get all your nasty plaque of your teeth.

Second, these aren’t put sealed packaging, there are just shoved in a box and who knows what material they’re made out of? Made in fancy China… no offense to China, I really like them, they just have a bad reputation for cheaply made products that have harmful chemicals in them.

Sorry but this is a hard NO for me and a return.

The soft and different bristle lengths are specifically designed to provide more effective cleaning, ensuring no plaque build-up and efficiency for both adults and kids. It also comes in four different colors, so you know which one is yours. Each pack comes with 8 brush heads, making this product a cost and time-efficient alternative to replacing the sonic toothbrush throughout the year. From toothbrushes to whitening treatments, Sonic-FX is continually providing promising products that are both practical and convenient.
